MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Requests for Admission, Set 1, Nos. 1 through 8 are deemed admitted. (CCP section 2033.280).

Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at noah@ndllegal.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
